HEADER_SUBTITLE: Fachpraktikum Programmiersysteme WiSe25/26 by Marie G., Florian M., Ben L., Oliver S. and Alexander K.

BODY.NO_NET_TO_SAVE: There is no Petri net to save.
BODY.TRANSITION_NOT_ACTIVATED: The transition {{label}} is not activated and cannot be fired.
BODY.MODE_SWITCHED_EXAM: You are now in exam mode.
BODY.MODE_SWITCHED_LEARN: You are now in learning mode.
BODY.FILE_EMPTY_OR_UNREADABLE: The selected file is empty or could not be read.
BODY.DOWNLOAD_FAILED: File at {{url}} could not be loaded.{{details}}
BODY.EMPTY_RESPONSE: No content was returned from the server at {{url}}.
BODY.FILE_NOT_INTERPRETABLE: The file could not be interpreted.
BODY.CRITICAL_PARSING_ERROR: A critical error occurred while parsing the file.
BODY.LOAD_NET_FIRST: Please load a Petri net first.
BODY.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please load a Petri net first.
BODY.VALIDATION_VALID_MAXIMAL: The process net is valid and maximal.

VALIDATION_MESSAGES.TRANSITION_NO_MATCH: ❌ Transition {{label}} has no matching label in the Petri net.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.PRESET_WEIGHT_MISMATCH: ❌ Preset weight mismatch at {{label}} for place {{place}}. Expected: {{expected}} / Found: {{found}}
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.POSTSET_WEIGHT_MISMATCH: ❌ Postset weight mismatch at {{label}} for place {{place}}. Expected: {{expected}} / Found: {{found}}
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.PLACE_NO_INCOMING: ❌ Place {{label}} has no incoming arc, although it is not a start place in this process net.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.PLACE_MULTIPLE_PRODUCERS: ❌ Place {{place}} has more than one producer – violates causality.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.CYCLE_DETECTED: ❌ Process net contains a cycle – process nets must be acyclic.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.MISSING_START_PLACES: ❌ Start places missing in process net: {{places}}. Please place all marked places.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.MARKED_START_PLACES_NOT_IN_NET: ❌ The marked start places ({{places}}) are not in the process net.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.NOT_MAXIMAL: Info: Process net is not maximal. Transition {{label}} can still be fired with places ({{places}}).

PROCESS_NET.BUTTON_SET_START_POSITION: Set Start Position (clears current Process Net)
PROCESS_NET.INSTRUCTION_DRAG_DROP: Drag elements from the left display area here to create your process net.
PROCESS_NET.INSTRUCTION_LEFT_CLICK_MOVE: Left-click and drag elements to move them.
PROCESS_NET.INSTRUCTION_MIDDLE_CLICK_DELETE: Middle-click a place or transition to delete it (connections are removed automatically).
PROCESS_NET.INSTRUCTION_RIGHT_CLICK_CONNECT: Right-click a place or transition to select it as source; then right-click the opposite type to create a directed connection to the second element.
PROCESS_NET.INSTRUCTION_MIDDLE_CLICK_DELETE_CONN: Middle-click a connection to delete it.
PROCESS_NET.INSTRUCTION_VALIDATE_TOAST: Validate to see a toast message with the result.
